titles.title: He is Lord, He is Lord

authors.author: Aus der Bibel
Marvin Virgil Frey
Er ist Herr (Von den Toten auferstanden ist der Herr)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is Lord, He is Lord, He is risen from the dead and He is Lord! Every knee shall bow, every tongue confess That Jesus Christ is Lord!
